arts.ttl: Inter CEO Marotta speaks ahead of Milan derby
arts.sum: In a pre-match interview with DAZN before the highly anticipated Milan derby, Inter’s CEO Giuseppe Marotta shared his thoughts on the upcoming clash. This marks Marotta’s 18th derby as an Inter executive, but his first as president. Marotta emphasized the significance of the occasion, stating, “This can be an additional stimulus in a context like the derby.
